description: Realm Divided Patch 2 (17 December 2025) — Faction Warfare Changes, Other Changes, Combat Balance Changes, Fixes.

sections.heading: Faction Warfare Changes

subsections.heading: Caerleon Attack Changes

items.text: Caerleon no longer has a limit on its number of lethal Province attacks
Caerleon no longer declares a new attack after winning a Fortress Siege, or after winning a Supply contest as a defender
If Caerleon does not have at least two active conflicts at any one time, they will declare up to two new attacks to reach this minimum

subsections.searchable_text: Caerleon Attack Changes Caerleon no longer has a limit on its number of lethal Province attacks Caerleon no longer declares a new attack after winning a Fortress Siege, or after winning a Supply contest as a defender If Caerleon does not have at least two active conflicts at any one time, they will declare up to two new attacks to reach this minimum

subsections.heading: Rallying Cry Buff

items.text: Difference of 1: No buff
Difference of 2: +5% damage and defense vs. Faction players
Difference of 3: +10% damage and defense vs. Faction players
Difference of 4: +15% damage and defense vs. Faction players
Difference of 5: +20% damage and defense vs. Faction players

subsections.searchable_text: Rallying Cry Buff Difference of 1: No buff Difference of 2: +5% damage and defense vs. Faction players Difference of 3: +10% damage and defense vs. Faction players Difference of 4: +15% damage and defense vs. Faction players Difference of 5: +20% damage and defense vs. Faction players

subsections.heading: Other Changes

items.text: After changing Factions, a 24-hour cooldown now applies before a player can change Factions again

subitems.text: This cooldown does not apply after enlisting with a Faction for the first time

items.text: Faction Warfare Item Power requirements now consider only Base Item Power, without bonuses

subitems.text: Players must have a Base Item Power of 700 or above to use Faction Transports and participate in Faction Warfare activities, regardless of their Average Item Power

items.text: Adjustments and polish to several UI elements

subitems.text: Added a notification when a Province becomes cut off
Added a notification when a Fortress Siege enters the Last Stand stage
Fortress Siege and Pre-Siege states are now prioritized on the World Map over the Bandit Assault icon when both are present
Added a pulsating highlight on the World Map Province View to indicate zones with active relevant conflicts

sections.heading: Other Changes

items.text: Calming Potion no longer affects mobs that guard players (Faction Warfare Outpost mobs, Fortress and Territory mobs, Castle Guard mobs, City Guards), to ensure that Territory guards don’t ignore their guild members when they are nearby
The Trophy Shark furniture item can no longer be placed outdoors

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes
sections.description: Combat balance changes for this patch can be found here .
sections.searchable_text: Combat Balance Changes Combat balance changes for this patch can be found here .

sections.heading: Fixes

subsections.heading: Spell Fixes

items.text: Eye of the Storm (Dreadstorm Monarch): Fixed issue where incorrect VFX sizes were used for each stage

subsections.searchable_text: Spell Fixes Eye of the Storm (Dreadstorm Monarch): Fixed issue where incorrect VFX sizes were used for each stage

subsections.heading: Faction Warfare Fixes

items.text: Fixed issue where World Map Outpost information windows would indicate that an Outpost could be captured in inactive conflict zones

subitems.text: The specific reasons why an Outpost can or cannot be captured are now displayed

items.text: Fixed issue where players could respawn in an Outpost shortly after it was captured by a rival Faction
Fixed issue where Faction Transport icons would not change colors when Province control switched to another Faction
Fixed issue where the Fortress UI would display incorrect status information during Bandit Assault
Fixed issue where hints would stay open after closing the Faction Transport UI
Fixed issue where Faction Standing payouts from Weekly Reports could be applied to a Faction the player had already left

subsections.searchable_text: Faction Warfare Fixes Fixed issue where World Map Outpost information windows would indicate that an Outpost could be captured in inactive conflict zones The specific reasons why an Outpost can or cannot be captured are now displayed Fixed issue where players could respawn in an Outpost shortly after it was captured by a rival Faction Fixed issue where Faction Transport icons would not change colors when Province control switched to another Faction Fixed issue where the Fortress UI would display incorrect status information during Bandit Assault Fixed issue where hints would stay open after closing the Faction Transport UI Fixed issue where Faction Standing payouts from Weekly Reports could be applied to a Faction the player had already left

subsections.heading: UI Fixes

items.text: Fixed issue where the Alliance UI appeared behind the Guild UI when opened by clicking the Alliance crest
Fixed issue where Item Details UI would appear behind and overlap with the Kill Details UI
Fixed issue where Alliance invitation mails would not display the Alliance name
Fixed issue where ‘Move All’ would not work between Bank tabs
Fixed issue where Smuggler Crate icons displayed as Faction Chests on the minimap
Fixed issue where exit icons on Brecilien, Static Dungeons, and The Underway region maps could not be clicked for navigation
Fixed issue where the crafting progress bar would be obstructed by opened UIs
Fixed issue where the Party Finder UI could get stuck open until client restart

subsections.searchable_text: UI Fixes Fixed issue where the Alliance UI appeared behind the Guild UI when opened by clicking the Alliance crest Fixed issue where Item Details UI would appear behind and overlap with the Kill Details UI Fixed issue where Alliance invitation mails would not display the Alliance name Fixed issue where ‘Move All’ would not work between Bank tabs Fixed issue where Smuggler Crate icons displayed as Faction Chests on the minimap Fixed issue where exit icons on Brecilien, Static Dungeons, and The Underway region maps could not be clicked for navigation Fixed issue where the crafting progress bar would be obstructed by opened UIs Fixed issue where the Party Finder UI could get stuck open until client restart

subsections.heading: Other Fixes

items.text: Fixed issue where two Regions were mistakenly renamed

subitems.text: These have been reverted to their correct names

items.text: Fixed issue where Morgana Infestor’s Demonic Blades aura could deal too much damage to unmounted players
Fixed issue where activating Overcharge while casting could cause animation and visual glitches

subitems.text: It is no longer possible to activate Overcharge while casting

items.text: Fixed issue where chests would not respawn in Tier 3 Static Dungeons
Fixed issue where mobs with regeneration abilities could sometimes refuse to die
Various additional graphical, animation, terrain, audio, UI, and localization fixes
